_permissions._note: Two kinds of keys: ACCESS-GATING (Group Owner / Admin / Host / Moderator / Dancer / Staff / Traveler / Supporter) — wire interaction points to these. DISPLAY-ONLY (Patron / Performer) — name-wall ingestion, NOT for gating.
_permissions.Group Owner: GATING — Community owner — full admin access
_permissions.Admin: GATING — Co-Leader or Administrator staff role — full admin access
_permissions.Host: GATING — Host staff role (permanent) or per-event host/coordinator (21-day window) — full admin access
_permissions.Moderator: GATING — Moderator staff role (permanent) or per-event moderator/security (21-day window) — moderation access
_permissions.Dancer: GATING — East/West dance team, active guest dancer, or event-assigned dancer (21-day window) — performance-area access
_permissions.Staff: GATING — isStaff or any CommunityStaffRole — full admin access
_permissions.Traveler: GATING — Anyone in the community Discord — basic verified-member access
_permissions.Supporter: GATING — Active supporter tier (VRC store, Stripe, Patreon, or community grant) — supporter-tier perks
_permissions.Patron: DISPLAY ONLY — Sanctum community members (Patron CommunityMemberRole). Use for name walls / credits, NOT for gating.
_permissions.Performer: DISPLAY ONLY — Anyone with an active performance booking (event-performer/event-dancer staff role, or 21-day SlotTalent / DanceBlockDancer / EventStaff photographer/staff/streamer). Use for lineup / credits, NOT for gating.
